tasks.label: phase1-setup
tasks.command:
mkdir -p cmd/server internal/tools internal/prompts internal/server internal/transport && 
echo 'package main

import (
	"flag"
	"fmt"
)

func main() {
	transportFlag := flag.String("transport", "stdio", "Transport type: stdio, sse, or http")
	flag.Parse()
	fmt.Printf("Transport: %s\\n", *transportFlag)
}
' > cmd/server/main.go && 
echo 'package tools
' > internal/tools/tools.go && 
echo 'package prompts
' > internal/prompts/prompts.go && 
echo 'package server
' > internal/server/server.go && 
echo 'package transport
' > internal/transport/transport.go && 
echo 'Files created successfully'

tasks.label: phase1-scaffold
args: mkdir -p cmd/server internal/tools internal/prompts internal/server internal/transport && touch cmd/server/main.go internal/tools/tools.go internal/prompts/prompts.go internal/server/server.go internal/transport/transport.go && echo 'Phase 1 scaffolding complete'

tasks.label: phase1-init
args: set -e && mkdir -p cmd/server internal/tools internal/prompts internal/server internal/transport && ls -la

tasks.label: health-check
args: echo '== go mod tidy ==' && go mod tidy && echo '== go build ./... ==' && go build ./... && echo '== go test ./... ==' && go test ./...

tasks.label: healthcheck-to-file
args: (go mod tidy && go build ./... && go test ./...) > .healthcheck.txt 2>&1; echo $? > .healthcheck.code

tasks.label: healthcheck-to-file-rerun
args: (go mod tidy && go build ./... && go test ./...) > .healthcheck.txt 2>&1; echo $? > .healthcheck.code
